# invalidateTypeDescription(for:)

**Instance Method**

Invalidates the type description for the given project type.

## Declaration

```swift
func invalidateTypeDescription(for projectType: PHProjectType)
```

## Parameters

- **projectType**: The project type to invalidate.

## Discussion

If you call this method for project types other than [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/PhotosUI/PHProjectType/undefined], you must implement [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/PhotosUI/PHProjectTypeDescriptionDataSource/typeDescription(for:)] with functionality for the invalidated project type.

## Invalidating a Project Type

- **invalidateFooterText(forSubtypesOf:)**: Invalidates the footer text for the subtypes of the given project type.

items.description: Invalidates the footer text for the subtypes of the given project type.
items.name: invalidateFooterText(forSubtypesOf:)
